Description: CloudWatch Dashboard for DigitalAIAgenda App (Amplify Angular + Bedrock)

AmplifyBranch.Description: The Amplify branch name (main, dev, etc.)

LambdaFunctionName.Description: Name of the bedrock-chat Lambda function. Check Lambda console — typically: amplify-digitalaiagenda-<branch>-bedrock-chat-<hash>

AppSyncApiId.Description: AppSync GraphQL API ID. Check AppSync console → APIs → Settings

UserPoolId.Description: Cognito User Pool ID (e.g. us-east-1_XXXXXXXXX). Check Cognito console → User Pools

CalendarEventTableName.Description: DynamoDB table for CalendarEvent. Typically: CalendarEvent-<appsync-api-id>-NONE

NotificationTableName.Description: DynamoDB table for Notification. Typically: Notification-<appsync-api-id>-NONE

Region.Description: AWS region where resources are deployed

DashboardBody.Fn::Sub: {"widgets":[{"height":2,"width":24,"y":0,"x":0,"type":"text","properties":{"markdown":"# Agenda App Dashboard\n---","background":"transparent"}},{"height":1,"width":24,"y":2,"x":0,"type":"text","properties":{"markdown":"## Lambda — bedrock-chat","background":"transparent"}},{"height":6,"width":6,"y":3,"x":0,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/Lambda","Invocations","FunctionName","${LambdaFunctionName}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#2ca02c"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"Lambda Invocations","period":300}},{"height":6,"width":6,"y":3,"x":6,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/Lambda","Errors","FunctionName","${LambdaFunctionName}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#d62728"}],["AWS/Lambda","Throttles","FunctionName","${LambdaFunctionName}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#ff7f0e"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"Lambda Errors & Throttles","period":300}},{"height":6,"width":6,"y":3,"x":12,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/Lambda","Duration","FunctionName","${LambdaFunctionName}",{"stat":"Average","color":"#1f77b4"}],["AWS/Lambda","Duration","FunctionName","${LambdaFunctionName}",{"stat":"p99","color":"#9467bd"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"Lambda Duration (avg & p99)","period":300}},{"height":6,"width":6,"y":3,"x":18,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/Lambda","ConcurrentExecutions","FunctionName","${LambdaFunctionName}",{"stat":"Maximum","color":"#8c564b"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"Lambda Concurrent Executions","period":300}},{"height":1,"width":24,"y":9,"x":0,"type":"text","properties":{"markdown":"## AppSync — GraphQL API","background":"transparent"}},{"height":6,"width":8,"y":10,"x":0,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/AppSync","4XXError","GraphQLAPIId","${AppSyncApiId}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#ff7f0e"}],["AWS/AppSync","5XXError","GraphQLAPIId","${AppSyncApiId}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#d62728"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"AppSync Errors (4XX / 5XX)","period":300}},{"height":6,"width":8,"y":10,"x":8,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/AppSync","Latency","GraphQLAPIId","${AppSyncApiId}",{"stat":"Average","color":"#1f77b4"}],["AWS/AppSync","Latency","GraphQLAPIId","${AppSyncApiId}",{"stat":"p99","color":"#9467bd"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"AppSync Latency (avg & p99)","period":300}},{"height":6,"width":8,"y":10,"x":16,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/AppSync","ConnectSuccess","GraphQLAPIId","${AppSyncApiId}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#2ca02c"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"AppSync Connect Success","period":300}},{"height":1,"width":24,"y":16,"x":0,"type":"text","properties":{"markdown":"## DynamoDB — CalendarEvent & Notification Tables","background":"transparent"}},{"height":6,"width":8,"y":17,"x":0,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/DynamoDB","ConsumedReadCapacityUnits","TableName","${CalendarEventTableName}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#1f77b4"}],["AWS/DynamoDB","ConsumedReadCapacityUnits","TableName","${NotificationTableName}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#2ca02c"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"DynamoDB Read Capacity Consumed","period":300}},{"height":6,"width":8,"y":17,"x":8,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/DynamoDB","ConsumedWriteCapacityUnits","TableName","${CalendarEventTableName}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#ff7f0e"}],["AWS/DynamoDB","ConsumedWriteCapacityUnits","TableName","${NotificationTableName}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#d62728"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"DynamoDB Write Capacity Consumed","period":300}},{"height":6,"width":8,"y":17,"x":16,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/DynamoDB","ThrottledRequests","TableName","${CalendarEventTableName}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#d62728"}],["AWS/DynamoDB","ThrottledRequests","TableName","${NotificationTableName}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#ff7f0e"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"DynamoDB Throttled Requests","period":300}},{"height":1,"width":24,"y":23,"x":0,"type":"text","properties":{"markdown":"## Cognito — User Pool","background":"transparent"}},{"height":6,"width":8,"y":24,"x":0,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/Cognito","SignUpSuccesses","UserPool","${UserPoolId}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#2ca02c"}],["AWS/Cognito","SignInSuccesses","UserPool","${UserPoolId}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#1f77b4"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"Cognito Sign-Up & Sign-In","period":300}},{"height":6,"width":8,"y":24,"x":8,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/Cognito","TokenRefreshSuccesses","UserPool","${UserPoolId}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#9467bd"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"Cognito Token Refreshes","period":300}},{"height":6,"width":8,"y":24,"x":16,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/Cognito","CallCount","UserPool","${UserPoolId}",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#8c564b"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"Cognito API Call Count","period":300}},{"height":1,"width":24,"y":30,"x":0,"type":"text","properties":{"markdown":"## Amazon Bedrock — Nova Lite Model","background":"transparent"}},{"height":6,"width":8,"y":31,"x":0,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/Bedrock","Invocations","ModelId","us.amazon.nova-lite-v1:0",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#2ca02c"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"Bedrock Invocations","period":300}},{"height":6,"width":8,"y":31,"x":8,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/Bedrock","InvocationLatency","ModelId","us.amazon.nova-lite-v1:0",{"stat":"Average","color":"#1f77b4"}],["AWS/Bedrock","InvocationLatency","ModelId","us.amazon.nova-lite-v1:0",{"stat":"p99","color":"#9467bd"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"Bedrock Latency (avg & p99)","period":300}},{"height":6,"width":8,"y":31,"x":16,"type":"metric","properties":{"metrics":[["AWS/Bedrock","InputTokenCount","ModelId","us.amazon.nova-lite-v1:0",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#ff7f0e"}],["AWS/Bedrock","OutputTokenCount","ModelId","us.amazon.nova-lite-v1:0",{"stat":"Sum","color":"#2ca02c"}]],"view":"timeSeries","stacked":false,"region":"${Region}","title":"Bedrock Token Usage (In/Out)","period":300}}]}

DashboardURL.Description: Direct link to the CloudWatch dashboard

FindResourceNames.Description: Run these CLI commands to find your resource names
FindResourceNames.Value: aws lambda list-functions --query "Functions[?contains(FunctionName,'bedrock-chat')].FunctionName" --output text | aws appsync list-graphql-apis --query "graphqlApis[?contains(name,'digitalaiagenda')].apiId" --output text | aws cognito-idp list-user-pools --max-results 10 --query "UserPools[?contains(Name,'digitalaiagenda')].Id" --output text | aws dynamodb list-tables --query "TableNames[?contains(@,'CalendarEvent')]" --output text
